We send you under separate cover
printed matter descriptive of Spokane
and surrounding territory, but would
suggest that II you desire any fur
ther information relative to securing
employment that you address E. F.
Cartier Van Dissel, manager Of the
Sawmill Phoenix. Spokane, Wash.
Very truly yours,


L. g. MONROE. Secretary"


'rhe chamber of commerce is not
taking part in any strike" said Sec
rotary Monroe today II have been
sending out letters to different per-
sons and will continue to do so. We
want people to locate here and are
not trying to help out the milo ~ners
in their present difficulty.


MY letter books are open to any
labor organization In the city and
invite any of them to come here and
read the letters. ! am now sending
out a general letter telling of the
advantages Of Spokane and eattern
Washington.
